chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO C. P No. D-198 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection. 2. For order on M.A No. 1045/2017. (Exemption Application). 3. For hearing of main case. 02-03-2022 Mr. Faiz Muhammad Larik, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Additional Advocate General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. At the very outset, it is stated by learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh on behalf of the official respondents that if the petitioner would apply for the post on deceased quota other than the police constable then subject to qualification, he would be considered for such appointment in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied with the statement of Additional Advocate General, Sindh does not press the instant petition, it is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge Abdul Salam/P.A
